overall.description: First-person exploration of a derelict Soviet-era hotel in a post-apocalyptic urban setting. The player character moves along rain-slicked exterior ledges, navigates dark abandoned interior rooms, and climbs to an upper rooftop level under a stormy overcast sky. The environment features brutalist concrete architecture, scattered debris, and overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior balcony ledge of abandoned brutalist hotel overlooking ruined cityscape

events.description: camera begins panning right while moving forward along the ledge, revealing a red office chair
approaching the glass panel doors marking the entrance to the hotel interior

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the rain-slicked concrete ledge of a high-rise ruin, surveying the devastated cityscape and approaching the interior entrance

entered.detail: weathered concrete balcony ledge with scattered debris and rain puddles
distant derelict concrete apartment blocks visible through the haze
abandoned red upholstered office chair sitting on the ledge
massive raw concrete structural pillar with vertical grooves
broken glass doors leading into the hotel interior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked exterior ledge of a derelict Soviet-era hotel. The camera moves steadily along the concrete walkway, passing a lone red office chair and approaching broken glass doors. Through the haze, ruined apartment blocks are visible in the distance under a stormy overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark abandoned hotel interior with broken windows and scattered debris

events.description: entering the dark interior from the exterior ledge, light drops significantly
turning right to navigate through a darker interior room away from window light
approaching the metal ladder leading up to the rooftop level

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through dark, debris-filled rooms of the abandoned hotel, navigating around broken furniture and overgrown vegetation while heading toward a ladder

entered.detail: weathered concrete interior walls with peeling paint and graffiti
large window openings with missing glass revealing the exterior
simple metal frame chair with woven seat inside the room
weathered wooden crate or box on the debris floor
rusted metal ladder fixed to the wall leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark hotel interior through broken glass doors, leaving the exterior ledge behind. Inside, the space is dimly lit by overcast light filtering through empty window frames. The player navigates through debris-filled rooms, passing a metal chair and wooden crate, and approaches a rusted ladder leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper rooftop level with ventilation structures and open sky views

events.description: climbing the metal ladder to ascend to the upper rooftop level
emerging from the interior onto the open rooftop with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: climbing a metal ladder and stepping onto the rain-soaked upper rooftop, then walking along the concrete surface to survey the surrounding ruins

entered.detail: wet concrete rooftop with puddles and scattered debris
large rectangular concrete ventilation structure on the roof
low concrete wall running along the edge of the rooftop
leafless small tree growing out of the rooftop concrete

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player climbing a metal ladder, briefly showing a first-person hand, then emerging onto the open upper rooftop. The space is fully exposed to the overcast sky, featuring ventilation shafts, a concrete safety parapet, and dead trees growing from the concrete. The camera moves along the rooftop, offering unobstructed views of the surrounding ruined cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked exterior ledge into the dark depths of a derelict hotel before ascending to an exposed rooftop. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway past a lone red office chair, moving through a hazy atmosphere toward broken glass doors with ruined apartment blocks visible in the distance. As the camera passes through the shattered entrance, the scene shifts into a dimly lit interior where the player navigates through debris-filled rooms and past rusted furniture. The movement then transitions upward as the camera climbs a metal ladder, emerging from the gloom onto an open rooftop under a stormy overcast sky. Finally, the view expands across a concrete expanse of ventilation shafts and dead trees, offering an unobstructed panorama of the surrounding ruined cityscape.
